_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: We observed similar patterns of γH2AX foci formation and resolution over time in WT and Nf1+/− mutant mouse embryo fibroblasts, which suggests that Nf1 inactivation does not have global effects on DNA repair
details: Showed similar patterns of γH2AX foci formation and resolution over time as WT cells, suggesting Nf1 inactivation does not affect DNA repair
